criteria.requirement: Completed PhD in Economics or a closely related discipline
criteria.source_quote: A completed PhD in Economics or a closely related discipline.

criteria.requirement: Developing record of peer-reviewed research in applied economics

criteria.requirement: Communicate research to specialist and non-specialist audiences
criteria.source_quote: Ability to communicate research clearly to specialist and non-specialist audiences.
